summary: Tested db.integrations -> db.oauth_connections migration. All 47 backend tests passed (100%). db.integrations collection confirmed dropped. All integration endpoints (status, email-providers, finance/status, workdrive, all save-credentials) correctly read/write from oauth_connections. Frontend admin panel loads without errors for tenant admin.
critical_code_review_comments: All migration goals achieved: db.integrations dropped, oauth_connections is the sole source of truth for all integration records

success_rate.frontend: 100% (admin panel loads, Connect Services page loads correctly, tenant admin login works)

seed_data_creation: Test save-credentials API calls created zoho_crm, zoho_books, zoho_workdrive records in oauth_connections for tenant automate-accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Migration from db.integrations to db.oauth_connections is complete and verified. db.integrations collection does not exist. All integration read/write endpoints now use db.oauth_connections. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_migration_oauth_connections.py with 47 tests all passing. Tenant admin (AA) has 1 oauth_connection (zoho_mail is_validated=True) in 'automate-accounts' tenant. The platform admin's tenant_id is 'automate-accounts'. Tenant admin user mayank has tenant_id='6cb9c3e5-1e17-4e57-b443-564af4f5fa70' (no oauth_connections for that tenant - showing 'not configured' is expected behavior). Platform admin frontend login requires going through the gateway without a partner code, but the Continue button is disabled when empty - use API for platform admin testing.
